image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Nothing escapes a black hole — except the truth about how they work.
Context visual: Black holes are regions where gravity is so strong, not even light can escape.
Escalation visual: They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.
Evidence visual: Inside, gravity distorts spacetime, creating bizarre effects. Imagine time slowing down.
Payoff visual: So, while we can't escape a black hole, understanding them reveals the true wonders of the universe.
Cta visual: Curious for more cosmic mysteries? Hit that follow button!
